title: Fix class constructor chaining corner cases

features.name: class with only implicit constructor
features.description: Code should include a class with no explicit constructor function, relying on implicit constructor generation

features.name: derived class with explicit constructor extending parent
features.description: Code should include a derived class with explicit constructor that extends a parent class with only implicit constructor, without calling the parent's explicit constructor in extends clause

features.name: multi-level inheritance with explicit constructors
features.description: Code should include a three-level inheritance chain where the leaf class extends a parent with explicit constructor

features.name: instantiation triggering constructor chain bug
features.description: Code should include instantiation of a class object using new that triggers incorrect constructor chaining in multi-level inheritance

features.name: class with explicit and implicit constructor lookup conflict
features.description: Code should include a class hierarchy where method_from_name lookup for constructor returns parent class constructor instead of current class constructor due to independent lookup of explicit and implicit constructors
